messages.subject: Pure-black AMOLED dark mode?
messages.summary: Feature request: a pure-black (#000) theme variant for OLED screens.
messages.content:
<email>Hi! Drafto's dark mode is great but on my Pixel the dark grey background still glows. Could you add a pure-black theme variant for OLED screens?

Nothing else needs to change — just the bg colour token. Thanks for considering!

Priya</email>
